result.stdout:
Description:
  Interact with BISS DevOps Repros

Usage:
  bdo devops [command] [options]

Options:
  --debug         Attach Debugger
  --verbose       Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --interactive   Allow user interaction

Commands:
  list          List current devops projects
  key           DevOps connection/key management
  info <ids>    Repositories details
  backup <ids>  Backup repositories
  clone <ids>   Clone repositories

commands.payload:
Description:
  Interact with BISS DevOps Repros

Usage:
  bdo devops [command] [options]

Options:
  --debug         Attach Debugger
  --verbose       Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --interactive   Allow user interaction

Commands:
  list          List current devops projects
  key           DevOps connection/key management
  info <ids>    Repositories details
  backup <ids>  Backup repositories
  clone <ids>   Clone repositories

result.stdout:
Description:
  Backup repositories

Usage:
  bdo devops backup <ids>... [options]

Arguments:
  <ids>  Reposidory Id's from list command or * for all

Options:
  -r, --reload        Read projects from DevOps to local cache
  -n, --noZip         Do not ZIP Backup
  -s, --skipexisting  Skip if already exist
  -a, --skipazure     Do not load AzureDevops projects
  --debug             Attach Debugger
  --verbose           Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help      Show help and usage information
  --interactive       Allow user interaction

  -d, --delete    Delete key files

  --verbose       Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --interactive   Allow user interaction

result.stdout:
Description:
  Developer settings tools

Usage:
  bdo devset [command] [options]

Options:
  --debug         Attach Debugger
  --verbose       Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --interactive   Allow user interaction

Commands:
  info <root>               Infos about (BISS) project in a folder
  gen <root> <mainProject>  Generate new bs.xml file
  apply <root>              Apply settings from bs.xml to a (BISS) project
  bsec <key> <value>        Manage secrets in BISS Azure Key Vault

commands.payload:
Description:
  Developer settings tools

Usage:

Options:
  --debug         Attach Debugger
  --verbose       Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --interactive   Allow user interaction

Commands:
  info <root>               Infos about (BISS) project in a folder
  gen <root> <mainProject>  Generate new bs.xml file
  apply <root>              Apply settings from bs.xml to a (BISS) project
  bsec <key> <value>        Manage secrets in BISS Azure Key Vault

result.stdout:
Description:
  Apply settings from bs.xml to a (BISS) project

Usage:
  bdo devset apply <root> [options]

Arguments:
  <root>  Project root folder

Options:
  -g, --findgitrecursive               Find .git folder recursive in parent(s) directories
  -c, --configuration <configuration>  Config for build processe. Default ist Debug. Yo can use "-c Release" for Release Build
  --debug                              Attach Debugger
  --verbose                            Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
  --interactive                        Allow user interaction

commands.payload:
Description:
  Apply settings from bs.xml to a (BISS) project

Usage:
  bdo devset apply <root> [options]

Arguments:
  <root>  Project root folder

Options:
  -g, --findgitrecursive               Find .git folder recursive in parent(s) directories
  -c, --configuration <configuration>  Config for build processe. Default ist Debug. Yo can use "-c Release" for Release Build
  --debug                              Attach Debugger
  --verbose                            Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
  --interactive                        Allow user interaction

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage secrets in BISS Azure Key Vault

Usage:
  bdo devset bsec [<key> [<value>]] [options]

Arguments:
  <key>    Key name (for read|create|update)
  <value>  Value (for create|update)

Options:
  -i, --import    Read global FOTEC properties to usersecret "FOTEC"
  -o, --open      Open usersecret "FOTEC" folder
  --debug         Attach Debugger
  --verbose       Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --interactive   Allow user interaction

commands.payload:
Description:

  <value>  Value (for create|update)

Options:

  -o, --open      Open usersecret "FOTEC" folder
  --debug         Attach Debugger
  --verbose       Show Debug Infos in Console
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
